---
title: "{{< fa book-open >}} Domicílios"
subtitle: "{{< fa book >}} Dados Agregados por Setores Censitários - CENSO, IBGE, 2022"
author: "Thais Cshunderlick"
listing:
  - id: import
    contents: import/*/*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: [filename]
  - id: indicadores
    contents: indicadores/*/*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: [filename]
  - id: mapas
    contents: mapas/*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title]
    sort: [order]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# used indirectly by Quarto for code-link
# this code cell is to get renv to add these packages to the locfile
# https://github.com/rstudio/renv/issues/1672
library(xml2)
library(downlit)
```

## Dados

::: {#import}
:::

## Indicadores

::: {#indicadores}
:::

## Mapas

::: {#mapas}
:::
